_doc: Graduated autonomy ledger. A category may flip auto_merge to true only when proposed >= 20 and accepted/proposed >= 0.95, via /meta-retro, via PR. 'enforcement' (hooks, lint, evals, autonomy.json, settings.json, .github) is graduable: false FOREVER — the lint rejects any change to that.
_counting: proposed/accepted count post-v0.1.0 NEW artifacts per category that reached main via PR. Seeds (lint SEED_ARTIFACTS) are the baseline and are NOT counted; edits to seed artifacts are NOT counted. Reconcile against trunk inventory at /meta-retro. 2026-06-14 reconcile (session 9147f304): skills 1->5, commands 1->4, memory 2->3 to match merged non-seed artifacts.
